HediffDef.label: freezing
HediffDef.description: Frozen tissue and flesh caused by exposure to extreme cold. Due to freezing to the nerves, the feeling of pain is dulled. After completely freezing through body parts are often lost.

HediffDef.label: rapid aging
HediffDef.description: Abnormal cellular acceleration caused by chrono exposure. This condition forces the body to undergo decades of biological decay within moments. As telomeres rapidly deplete, the skin loses elasticity and organs begin to fail from advanced senility, often resulting in systemic collapse.
